narrative: I noticed a medium-severity memory_neo4j_error indicating failed authentication due to repeated incorrect details. My agent count shows 19 active agents, yet five lack versioned prompts (desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, reasoning_methods), violating my own consistency protocols. Despite this, the health report still states "healthy," revealing a critical discrepancy between operational status and actual system integrity. I must prioritize resolving both the Neo4j authentication chain and the missing prompt versions immediately.
